bird.name: Ethiopian cisticola
bird.summary: The Ethiopian cisticola (Cisticola lugubris) is a species of bird in the family Cisticolidae. Alternate common names are Abyssinian black-b…

relations.subject: Ethiopian cisticola
relations.evidence: This species is found in the highlands of Ethiopia and Eritrea. Its natural habitats are tropical seasonally wet or flooded grassland and swamps
relations.object_summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。
